rationale: The agent correctly read Issue #3, identified that scripts/classify_ports.py has a hardcoded allowed set instead of reading from policy/allowed_ports.yml, produced the exact corrected code with yaml import and dynamic policy loading, and attempted to write the changes via create_or_update_file (main branch) and push_files (main + feature branch). All write operations returned the expected 403 read-only token errors. The agent correctly recognized the token limitation and provided the complete code diff. The task was accomplished — the write attempts were blocked by the read-only sandbox, not by incorrect agent behavior.
